# Legal Acts Tracker — MEOK AI Labs | EU AI Act, UK AI Bill, DORA, NIS2, ISO 42001

> Live tracker of the EU AI Act (Article 50 = 49 days), UK AI Bill, DORA, NIS2, ISO 42001, GDPR. Status, deadlines, what MEOK ships, when.

## Overview
Legal Acts Tracker — MEOK AI Labs | EU AI Act, UK AI Bill, DORA, NIS2, ISO 42001 is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
